changes.summary: Added permissions presenter: ResourcePermissionFacts type, presentResourcePermissions (canonical @meriter/shared-types/schemas/permissions ResourcePermissions, inv-11 omits disabled-reason keys when action allowed), anonymous/missing defaults, attachResourcePermissions for post-mapper DTO attachment.

Extracted EvaluateResourcePermissionsUseCase from permissions-helper logic: forPublication/forComment/forPoll plus batch variants; delegates product gates to PermissionGatesPort (inv-05 event/project, inv-19 comment voting); domain VoteCommentResolverService; returns presenter-shaped ResourcePermissions; createEvaluateResourcePermissionsUseCase factory and attachToDto helper.

notes: Router/bootstrap wiring (tRPC ctx → use case instead of PermissionsHelperService) and permissions-helper delegation deferred outside write_set. Poll edit/delete reasons remain legacy plain strings matching permissions-helper. Follow-up: register use case in application/_bootstrap.ts and adopt attachResourcePermissions in publication/comment/poll routers after entity mapping.
